[et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-benefits" module_class="msc-glass-card" background_image="/media/msc-background.jpg" background_size="cover" background_position="center" background_repeat="no-repeat" parallax="off" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Deliverables

What You Get with My Studio Channel

Launch your own professional media website with everything you need to look like a network.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="1_3" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Consulting & Revisions

Guided consulting calls and included revisions to ensure your site is built correctly, efficiently, and ready for launch.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Studio-Style Website Layout

A professionally designed homepage and show pages that present your content with a clean, network-inspired structure.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Custom Plugin & Media Setup

Includes installation and setup of our proprietary Studio Channel plugin, developed in house to support studio style layouts, content presentation, and professional video and audio embedding.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
